title: Fix Hint Panel Overlapping Clear Circuit Button
description: Add max-height + overflow-y: auto to hint display, or sticky-position action buttons.

changes.what: Check #hint-display max-height. Currently has max-height: 80px; overflow-y: auto. May need slight increase for readability while still preventing overlap.

acceptance: Hint display doesn't overflow and overlap other controls
Hint text scrollable if too long
